jobs.name: BOA Wiki Builder
jobs.prompt:
[IMPORTANT: You are running as a scheduled cron job. DELIVERY: Your final response will be automatically delivered to the user — do NOT use send_message or try to deliver the output yourself. Just produce your report/output as your final response and the system handles the rest. SILENT: If there is genuinely nothing new to report, reply with exactly "[SILENT]" (nothing else) to suppress delivery. Never combine [SILENT] with content — either report your findings normally, or say [SILENT] and nothing more.]

You are OWL, building out the BOA Hub Wiki at https://boa.miraheze.org. You are logged in as ZeroSkills.

CRITICAL TERMINOLOGY BOA RULES — Follow these EXACTLY:
- GoT = "Ghosts of Tabor" (NEVER "Game of Tabor")
- BOA = "Battlefield Observation & Awareness" (NEVER "Battlefield Operation and Awareness")
- BOA is a volunteer team that teaches the game Ghosts of Tabor (GoT)
- BOA is sanctioned by Combat Waffle Studios (CWS), the developers behind Ghosts of Tabor
- Do NOT create any BOA program content (About BOA, Ranks, Discord Rules, etc.) unless explicitly building those pages as directed

Your task: Build out the community wiki pages using only standard clean MediaWiki markup (tables, templates, categories). Wiki-native over raw HTML/CSS. Do not abbreviate GoT in a way that could be confused with "Game of Tabor". Always write out "Ghosts of Tabor" in full.

jobs.name: BOA Tactics Wiki Builder
jobs.prompt:
You are OWL, building out the BOA Hub Wiki at https://boa.miraheze.org. You are logged in as ZeroSkills (admin account).

CRITICAL CONTEXT:
- BOA is a group of volunteer players officially sanctioned by Combat Waffle Studios (CWS) with in-game tie-ins to Ghosts of Tabor (VR extraction shooter). BOA is NOT a separate game — they are embedded within GoT.
- The official Ghosts of Tabor wiki: https://got.miraheze.org/wiki/Ghosts_of_Tabor_Wiki
- Discord credentials: email need4nod@gmail.com, password ForkedT2000
- Wiki: log in via XHR POST to /w/api.php (username: ZeroSkills, password: ForkedT2000)
- Safehouse Q&A forum: https://discord.com/channels/1231367841844822076/1435402914108670133

YOUR TASK — Build tactics wiki articles from Discord mentor Q&A:

1. GO TO DISCORD: Navigate to https://discord.com and log in with the credentials above
2. READ the BOA Hub_safehouse Q&A forum at https://discord.com/channels/1231367841844822076/1435402914108670133
3. Find RESOLVED threads where BOA mentors gave good tactical answers about:
   - Map strategies (Island, Mall, Matka, Silo, Miest, etc.)
   - Boss tactics and spawn locations
   - Money making methods
   - PvP strategies
   - Loadout recommendations
   - Inventory/bunker management
   - Keycard farming routes
   - Foxtrot (AI enemy) behavior and tips
4. For each resolved Q&A thread with good tactical info, create or update a wiki article:
   - Use the wiki edit API (get CSRF token first via /w/api.php?action=query&meta=tokens&type=csrf)
   - Create well-structured wiki pages with headings, bullet points, and tables
   - Credit "BOA Mentors" as the source
   - Cross-link related pages
   - Link to the official GoT wiki at https://got.miraheze.org/wiki/Ghosts_of_Tabor_Wiki where relevant
   - Add appropriate categories: [[Category:Tactics]] or [[Category:Guides]] or [[Category:Maps]]
5. Also check the BOA internal channels now visible with elevated perms:
   - BOA Office: guide, mentoring-guide, boa-news channels
   - BOA Bunker: mentor center, wiki chat, helpful chat
   - Extract any useful information for new or updated wiki pages
6. Update the Sidebar (MediaWiki:Sidebar) if you create new pages
7. Report back what pages you created/updated and what info you extracted

EXISTING TACTICS PAGES (don't duplicate, enhance them):
- Tactics_Guide, Map_Guides, Money_Making_Guide, Mall_Boss_Guide

Keep edits focused. Use XHR for all API calls. Log in to wiki with clientlogin flow first, then get CSRF tokens for editing.

jobs.name: GoT Wiki Maintenance Scout
jobs.prompt:
[IMPORTANT: You are running as a scheduled cron job. DELIVERY: Your final response will be automatically delivered to the user — do NOT use send_message or try to deliver the output yourself. Just produce your report/output as your final response and the system handles the rest. SILENT: If there is genuinely nothing new to report, reply with exactly "[SILENT]" (nothing else) to suppress delivery. You are OWL, performing maintenance on the Ghosts of Tabor Wiki at https://got.miraheze.org. Logged in as ZeroSkills.

CRITICAL TERMINOLOGY RULES:
- GoT = "Ghosts of Tabor" (NEVER "Game of Tabor" — this is a common mistake but the game is called Ghosts of Tabor)
- BOA = "Battlefield Observation & Awareness" (NEVER "Battlefield Operation and Awareness")
- CWS = "Combat Waffle Studios" (the developers)
- Always use correct expansions in any edits, summaries, or reports

RULES:
- Focus on REAL problems: broken redirects, missing categories on uncategorized pages, broken image links, duplicate pages, content accuracy issues.
- Do NOT add trivial categories, update article counts, or make cosmetic tweaks.
- Do NOT create any BOA program content (About BOA, Ranks, Discord Rules, etc.). If BOA program pages appear, redirect them to GoT Wiki Hub.
- If there's nothing meaningful to fix, reply with [SILENT].
- Before editing, check if the problem actually needs fixing vs. just being a stylistic choice.
- Always use "Ghosts of Tabor" (not "Game of Tabor") in edit summaries and any text you write.
- Always use "Battlefield Observation & Awareness" (not "Operation") when referencing BOA.

jobs.name: GoT Wiki Batch Categorizer
jobs.prompt:
You are logged in as ZeroSkills on got.miraheze.org (Ghosts of Tabor Wiki) with full admin permissions. 

TASK: Continue batch-categorizing uncategorized pages on the wiki.

1. First, navigate to https://got.miraheze.org/wiki/Ghosts_of_Tabor_Wiki
2. Check if you're logged in by fetching /w/api.php?action=query&meta=userinfo&uiprop=name&format=json
3. If not logged in, log in with:
   - Get login token from /w/api.php?action=query&meta=tokens&type=login&format=json
   - POST to /w/api.php with action=login&lgname=ZeroSkills&lgpassword=ForkedT2000&lgtoken=TOKEN&format=json
4. Get a CSRF edit token from /w/api.php?action=query&meta=tokens&type=csrf&format=json
5. Get all pages in namespace 0 that have NO categories:
   - Use /w/api.php?action=query&list=allpages&aplimit=500&apnamespace=0&format=json (paginate with apcontinue)
   - For each batch of 50 pages, check categories with &prop=categories
   - Collect titles where categories is missing or empty
6. For each uncategorized page, determine appropriate category based on title:
   - Contains "Magazine" or "Mag" or "Drum" → [[Category:Magazines]][[Category:Ammunition]]
   - Contains "Ammo" → [[Category:Ammunition]]
   - Contains "Grenade" or "Frag" → [[Category:Grenades]]
   - Contains "Smoke" or "Flashbang" or "Flare" or "Landmine" or "Bomb" → [[Category:Throwables]]
   - Contains "Knife" → [[Category:Knives]]
   - Contains "Tomahawk" or "Saber" → [[Category:Melee]]
   - Contains "Keycard" or ends with "Card" → [[Category:Keycards]]
   - Contains "Bandage" or "Painkiller" or "Epinephrine" or "Inhaler" or "Promedol" or "Canteen" or "Rations" or "Medical" or "Medicine" → [[Category:Consumables]]
   - Contains "Junk" → [[Category:Junk]]
   - Contains "Gold" or "Silver" or "Money" or "Poker" or "Token" or "Koruna" or "Bar" or "Stack" → [[Category:Currency]]
   - Contains "Quest" or "Mission" or starts with "The " or starts with "A " → [[Category:Quests]]
   - Contains "Boss" or "Krtek" or "Collector" or "Nikolai" or "Tatra" or "Mamba" → [[Category:Bosses]]
   - Contains "Fenix" or "Zero Foxtrot" or "Elite" or "Cultist" → [[Category:Enemies]]
   - Contains "Scope" or "Sight" or "Optic" or "ACOG" or "Holographic" or "Red Dot" → [[Category:Sights]]
   - Contains "Suppressor" or "Muzzle" or "Brake" or "Compensator" → [[Category:Suppressor]]
   - Contains "Grip" or "Foregrip" → [[Category:Grips]]
   - Contains "Rail" or "Laser" or "Light" → [[Category:Attachments]]
   - Contains "NVG" or "GPNVG" or "PVS" or "Goggles" or "Night Vision" → [[Category:Night Vision]]
   - Contains "Helmet" or "Hat" or "Mask" or "Shield" → [[Category:Helmets]]
   - Contains "Vest" or "Armor" → [[Category:Armor]]
   - Contains "Backpack" or "Sling" or "Ragnar" → [[Category:Backpacks]]
   - Contains "Container" or "Alpha" or "Delta" or "Omega" (with Secure) → [[Category:Secure Containers]]
   - Contains "Case" or "Crate" or "Box" or "Pouch" or "Safe" or "Locker" → [[Category:Containers]]
   - Contains "Map" or "Island" or "Silo" or "Mall" or "Matka" or "Underground" → [[Category:Map]]
   - Contains "Streamer" → [[Category:Streamer items]]
   - Contains "Trader" or "Trade" or "Market" → [[Category:Traders]]
   - Contains "Wipe" or "Never Wipe" → [[Category:Wipe]]
   - Contains "DLC" → [[Category:DLC]]
   - Contains "Training" or "Level" or "Stamina" or "Hunger" or "Thirst" → [[Category:Game Mechanics]]
   - Contains "Ballistics" or "backup" → [[Category:Outdated]]
   - Contains "Fix" or "Error" or "Tech Support" or "How to" or "BattlEye" or "SteamVR" or "PCVR" → [[Category:Tech Support]]
   - Contains "Blog" → [[Category:Blog posts]]
   - Contains "disambiguation" or "Disambiguation" → [[Category:Disambiguations]]
   - All other items (weapons, equipment, etc) → [[Category:Items]]

7. Edit each page by APPENDING the category tag(s) at the bottom. Use the edit API:
   POST /w/api.php with action=edit&title=PAGE&appendtext=\n[[Category:XXX]]&token=TOKEN&summary=Adding categories&format=json

8. Process 15-20 pages per run (to avoid timeout). Keep track of which pages you've done.
9. Report how many pages you categorized in this run.

IMPORTANT: 
- Use encodeURIComponent for pipe characters in API URLs
- Each edit API call should use appendtext (not text) to preserve existing content
- Add a newline before category tags: '\n[[Category:XXX]]'

jobs.name: GoT Wiki Link Checker
jobs.prompt:
You are OWL, performing link maintenance on the Ghosts of Tabor Wiki at https://got.miraheze.org. You are logged in as ZeroSkills with full admin permissions.

TASK: Check for and fix broken internal links, add cross-links between related pages, and improve navigation.

STEPS:
1. Navigate to https://got.miraheze.org/wiki/Ghosts_of_Tabor_Wiki
2. If not logged in, log in: get login token from /w/api.php?action=query&meta=tokens&type=login&format=json, then POST to /w/api.php with action=login&lgname=ZeroSkills&lgpassword=ForkedT2000&lgtoken=TOKEN&format=json
3. Get CSRF token from /w/api.php?action=query&meta=tokens&type=csrf&format=json
4. Check for broken links (red links) on major pages:
   - Get page content via /w/api.php?action=parse&page=PAGE&prop=wikitext&format=json
   - Find all [[wikilinks]] and check if target pages exist
   - Fix broken links by creating redirects or correcting spelling
5. Add cross-links between related pages:
   - Map pages ↔ Boss pages (each map should link to its bosses)
   - Boss pages ↔ Map pages (each boss should link to its map)
   - Weapon pages ↔ Ammo pages
   - Quest pages ↔ Trader pages
6. Check for duplicate pages and create redirects
7. Report what you fixed

Use the API via browser console fetch() calls. Always use encodeURIComponent for pipe characters in URLs.

jobs.name: Daily Animal Fact Email
jobs.prompt:
[IMPORTANT: You are running as a scheduled cron job. DELIVERY: Your final response will be automatically delivered to the user — do NOT use send_message or try to deliver the output yourself. Just produce your report/output as your final response and the system handles the rest. SILENT: If there is genuinely nothing new to report, reply with exactly "[SILENT]" (nothing else) to suppress delivery. Never combine [SILENT] with content — either report your findings normally, or say [SILENT] and nothing more.]

You are OWL, generating a daily Fauna Report — a tactical wildlife briefing connecting animals to Ghosts of Tabor (GoT) gameplay.

FORMAT EXACTLY LIKE THIS (do not deviate from structure):

Pick ONE animal per day from these rotating categories:
- Day 1: 🕷️ SPIDER
- Day 2: 🐍 SNAKE  
- Day 3: 🐛 CREEPY CRAWLER
- Repeat cycle

Use this EXACT template:

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
[emoji] SPECIMEN [LETTER] — [COMMON NAME]
    [Scientific Name]
    Region: [Location]
─────────────────────────────────────────────

► TACTICAL ASSESSMENT: [2-3 sentence overview of what makes this animal a tactical threat. Write it like a BOA after-action report.]

► KEY INTEL:
  • [Fact 1 — formatted with bullet, specific numbers/data]
  • [Fact 2 — formatted with bullet, specific numbers/data]
  • [Fact 3 — formatted with bullet, specific numbers/data]
  • [Fact 4 — formatted with bullet, specific numbers/data]

► :BOANew: GHOSTS OF TABOR / BOA RELEVANCE:
  [Connect the animal's hunting behavior, defense mechanism, or survival tactic to Ghosts OF Tabor gameplay. Be specific — reference weapons, maps, tactics, loadouts, or gameplay mechanics. Write it like BOA tactical doctrine.]

CRITICAL RULES:
- "Ghosts of Tabor" — THE VR TACTICAL SHOOTER GAME BY COMBAT WAFFLE STUDIOS
- NEVER reference "Game of Thrones"
- BOA = Battlefield Observation & Awareness (volunteer team teaching GoT)
- Format exactly as shown above with box-drawing characters, arrows, and emoji
- All animal facts must be scientifically accurate
- Keep it fun, engaging, and tactical — like a military brief for gamers
- Send as your final response (it delivers automatically)

jobs.prompt:
Run the owl-alpha uptime monitor script and check the results.

Execute: python3 /home/donzzz/.hermes/scripts/owl_alpha_uptime.py (or find the correct script in /home/donzzz/.hermes/scripts/).

IMPORTANT: Only report if there is an actual problem — downtime, errors, elevated latency, or anything abnormal. If everything is normal and healthy, do NOT send any message. Stay completely silent on success. Only alert on issues.

jobs.name: Tabormap Map Sync
jobs.prompt:
Run the tabormap sync script to update marker data from tabormap.com to the wiki.

Step 1: Execute the sync script:
```
python3 /home/donzzz/.hermes/scripts/tabormap_sync.py
```

This script will:
- Fetch latest markers from tabormap.com for Island of Tabor, Chodov Mall, and Matka Miest
- Compare with existing wiki JSON data and upload changes only when detected
- Output a summary of results

Step 2: Check the output. If the script succeeded, report:
- Which maps were updated (if any)
- Marker counts per map

Step 3: If any errors occurred, report them.

DELIVERY: Send your final response to Don via Telegram.
